user.title: iStore Heat Pump
user.description:
Enter your iStore login credentials.

These are the same credentials you use to log in at https://home.istore.net.au

error.invalid_auth: Login failed. Check your email and password.
error.cannot_connect: Could not connect to iStore. Check your internet connection and try again.

abort.already_configured: This iStore device is already configured.

init.title: iStore Heat Pump Options
init.description:
Configure parameters for thermodynamic calculations.

These values affect the estimated remaining hot water and shower time sensors.
